title: Daewoo Essentials 1.7L Fast Boil Electric Kettle – Black Plastic Cordless Jug with Auto Shut-Off & Boil-Dry Protection, Compact, Easy to Use & Clean
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 1.7L Large Capacity for Busy Homes – Boil enough water for up to 7 cups, perfect for breakfast time, family use or preparing multiple hot drinks in one go
Fast Boil with 1850-2200W Power – Boils water quickly to save you time on busy mornings, ideal for tea, coffee, or cooking preparation
Built-In Safety with Auto Shut-Off & Boil-Dry Protection – Designed for peace of mind with automatic shut-off when boiling is complete or when empty
Cordless Jug with Lightweight Plastic Body – Easy to handle and pour thanks to the cordless design and cool-touch plastic construction
Clear Water Gauge & Locking Lid – Fill accurately using the visible water level window, and enjoy spill-free boiling with the secure lid closure
description: Whether you're making the first cuppa of the day or prepping hot water for your cooking, the Daewoo Essentials 1.7L Fast Boil Kettle is designed to simplify your routine. With its generous 1.7-litre capacity, it's perfect for family mornings, student kitchens, or anyone who regularly makes tea, coffee, or instant meals. Thanks to its 1850–2200W power rating, it boils water quickly – no more waiting around. Safety is prioritised with automatic shut-off and boil-dry protection, so you never have to worry about leaving it on empty. The cordless design and lightweight plastic body make it easy to handle, especially for those who want a no-fuss, no-frills kettle that gets the job done. The clear water level indicator ensures you only boil what you need, helping save energy. The locking lid helps prevent spills, and cleaning is simple with a wide opening and wipe-clean exterior. Whether you're furnishing your first flat, upgrading a tired appliance, or need a practical kettle for a shared space, this model delivers essential performance with everyday convenience.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Large Capacity 1.7L, Visible Water Gauge, LED Illuminate Light, Wide Opening Lid, Auto Shut Off, Removable Filter For Easy Cleaning, Timeless Design
